translation.hero_desc: Experience ultra-premium automotive detailing. From multi-stage machine paint corrections to certified 9H nanotech ceramic coatings, we treat your vehicle to elite aesthetic and protective standards.
translation.desc_dash_garage: Add cars to build custom treatments
translation.slider_desc: Drag the interactive center slider left and right to observe how our signature dual-action micro-compounding stage slices away swirl marks, spiderweb surface abrasions, and dull oxidative weathering to reveal deep optical clarity.
translation.standards_subheading: Why premium automotive care requires scientific precision over automated car wash bays.
translation.std_desc_wash: Separate cleaning solution grids and dedicated lower-body mitts isolate grit lines, eliminating wash-induced swirl markings completely.
translation.std_desc_prep: Advanced active pH iron-dissolving chemical baths pull micro-particulate metallic fallout completely free from automotive clear coats.
translation.std_desc_experts: Authorized technicians apply liquid silica quartz layers uniformly to guarantee long-term surface cross-linking strength.
translation.std_desc_bays: Regulated clean rooms monitor ambient humidity and dust counts to isolate coatings during sensitive initial crystallization hours.
translation.reviews_subheading: Real feedback from verified luxury vehicle and exotic fleet owners.
translation.faq_subheading: Clear breakdowns of professional chemical detailing and car care boundaries.
translation.faq_q_0: What is the difference between a standard wax and a Ceramic Coating?
translation.faq_a_0: Traditional automotive wax sits as a temporary layer on top of your paint clear coat and degrades under heat washing cycles within weeks. Ceramic coatings utilize modern liquid nanotech silica (SiO2) compounds that chemically bond deep into your clear-coat pore structures, forming an ultra-hard sacrificial high-gloss glass barrier lasting years.
translation.faq_q_1: Does Paint Correction eliminate deep scratches down to the metal?
translation.faq_a_1: Paint correction works safely by leveling micro-fractions of your vehicle's top clear coat layer to remove blemishes. If a scratch completely penetrates through the clear coat down past the color primer coat, it cannot be safely polished out and requires professional automotive touch-up paint filling.
translation.faq_q_2: How long must my vehicle remain inside the curing bay post ceramic treatment?
translation.faq_a_2: We require vehicles to remain inside our sealed indoor climate-stabilized studio environment for a minimum of twelve hours post-application. This ensures initial protective cross-linking occurs perfectly before exposing the fresh coating to ambient road conditions.
translation.cta_desc: Register your vehicle inside your account garage workspace profile and lock down an open detailing suite bay timing slot instantly.
translation.services_desc: Select from our scientifically balanced paint, coating, and deep interior extraction services.
translation.guarantee_desc: All assignments are insured and digitally documented with professional verification.

translation.footer_desc: Premium auto detailing and finish restoration. Contact us for bookings, estimates, or support by email.
translation.team_desc: A close-knit team focused on careful workmanship, clear communication and premium results.
translation.team_owner_bio: Oversees every booking and the studio’s quality standard from consultation to handover.
translation.team_specialist_bio: Delivers meticulous cleaning, correction and protection work with care for every detail.
translation.privacy_intro: This policy explains how Apex Studio handles personal information when you use the website and book services.
translation.privacy_data_desc: We collect the information you provide to create an account, save vehicles, make bookings or contact us, such as your name, email address, phone number, vehicle details and booking notes.
translation.privacy_use_desc: We use this information to operate your account, arrange appointments, communicate about your booking and improve our customer service.
translation.privacy_sharing_desc: We do not sell personal information. We use Supabase to provide account, vehicle and booking functionality. Information is only shared when needed to operate the service or where legally required.
translation.privacy_rights_desc: You may ask to access, correct or delete your account information. Contact us using the details below to make a request.
translation.storage_intro: This website uses only the storage needed to provide its core features. It does not currently use advertising or analytics cookies.
translation.storage_language_desc: Stores your chosen English or Macedonian language so it remains selected on your next visit.
translation.storage_auth_desc: Keeps an authenticated user signed in so protected account, garage and booking features work securely.
translation.storage_optional_desc: If analytics, advertising pixels or third-party embedded media are added in the future, we will update this policy and request consent before loading optional tracking technologies.
